howItWorks.intro: This dog age calculator uses standard formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: After age 2: +4.5-7.5 years per dog year depending on size
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: How accurate is the 7:1 rule?
faq.answer: The old 7:1 rule is inaccurate. Dogs mature much faster in year 1 (equivalent to 15 human years) and the rate varies by size. Large dogs age faster than small dogs.

faq.question: Why do small dogs live longer?
faq.answer: Large dogs age faster at a cellular level and are more prone to cancer and joint disease. Small breeds like Chihuahuas can live 15-20 years, while Great Danes average 7-8.

faq.question: When is my dog considered senior?
faq.answer: Small dogs: 10-12 years. Medium: 8-10. Large: 6-8. Giant: 5-6. Senior dogs need more frequent vet checkups and adjusted nutrition.

faq.question: What affects dog lifespan?
faq.answer: Breed, size, genetics, diet, exercise, veterinary care, and dental health. Mixed breeds tend to live slightly longer than purebreds on average.

faq.question: Is the Dog Age Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

sections.title: What Is the Dog Age Calculator?
sections.body: The Dog Age Calculator is a free online tool designed for users who need quick, accurate calculations in the practical calculation space. By entering your dog age, size, you get instant results including human equivalent age, life stage, avg life expectancy. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting human equivalent age right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In practical calculation, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by users worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to get accurate results with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your dog age and need to find the right human equivalent age. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.
